sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68280" key="moirologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μοιρο-λογέω</orth>, <sense id="n68280.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tell a man his fate</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μοιρολογῆσαι ἑαυτόν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:1:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
